title: Supply Chain Manager - Kuehne+Nagel India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Kuehne+Nagel India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
